news.summary: A prominent news outlet, The Times, took legal action against OpenAI and Microsoft in 2023, alleging copyright infringement. As a result of the lawsuit, the editorial content of The Times will now be featured on various Amazon platforms. The lawsuit underscores the importance of protecting intellectual property in the digital age, with significant implications for the involved parties and the wider media industry.
news.headline: The Times and Amazon strike A.I. licensing deal after suing OpenAI, Microsoft in 2023 for copyright infringement.

news.summary: In Santa Clara, California, SoundHound AI, Inc. (Nasdaq: SOUN), known for its expertise in voice artificial intelligence, has revealed a new collaboration today. The company has teamed up with Allina Health to introduce "Alli," an AI agent dedicated to enhancing patient engagement. This AI agent is operated through SoundHound's Amelia conversational AI platform. Alli's primary role is to field calls at Allina Health's Customer Experience Center. Through seamless integration with Allina Health’s electronic medical record system, Alli can promptly recognize and verify incoming callers.
news.headline: SoundHound AI and Allina Health launch AI agent Alli for patient engagement; integrates with EMR system. Powered by Amelia conversational AI platform.

news.summary: In Plano, Texas on May 29, 2025, The Salvation Army's Intermountain and Golden State Divisions announced RKD Group as their new fundraising agency of record. This partnership reflects RKD Group's dedication to aiding The Army's mission. The decision follows a trend of organizations aligning with RKD, further solidifying its position in the fundraising sector. The specific financial details of the agreement were not disclosed publicly.
news.headline: Intermountain and Golden State Divisions of The Salvation Army select RKD Group as fundraising agency of record.

news.summary: Ben Bronston has been honored in the Legal/Regulatory category by ChannelVision Magazine. The 2025 Visionary Spotlight Award (VSA) winner is recognized for his outstanding contributions. The prestigious award was announced on May 29, 2025, highlighting Bronston's exemplary work in the field.
news.headline: Ben Bronston awarded the 2025 Visionary Spotlight Award by ChannelVision Magazine for excellence in IT and telecom legal services.

news.summary: Appleton, Wisconsin - On May 29, 2025, Gateway Financial Partners proudly revealed the promotion of Mike Kitzman to the innovative position of Chief Engagement Officer (CEO). With this promotion, Mike will directly report to the Chief Growth Officer and take charge of various key responsibilities.
news.headline: Mike Kitzman promoted to Chief Engagement Officer at Gateway Financial Partners in Appleton, Wis. - May 29, 2025.

news.summary: The FlipHTML5 template center offers over 1000 flipbook templates to help users kickstart digital content creation efficiently. With each template showcasing a distinct array of designs, layouts, and color themes, users have ample options to choose from. On May 29, 2025, in Hong Kong, the platform announced this resourceful feature.
news.headline: FlipHTML5 template center offers over 1000 customizable flipbook templates for digital content creation, each with unique designs and color themes. HONG KONG, May 29, 2025.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, AiCure, a prominent AI and data analytics company specializing in revolutionizing clinical trials and patient interaction, revealed the selection of Sabina Chadha as its latest Chief Executive Officer. The current CEO, Ed Ikeguchi, M.D., will be stepping down from his position.
news.headline: AiCure appoints Sabina Chadha as CEO, while Ed Ikeguchi transitions to CMO. Josh Wilson promoted to COO & President.

news.summary: Based in Norwood, Massachusetts, on May 29, 2025, Amplix, a technology advisory services provider, disclosed the purchase of The Hastings Group, LLC. The acquisition signifies a significant move for Amplix, backed by Gemspring Capital, expanding its offerings in strategy, consulting, implementation, and managed services. This transaction marks a strategic decision for Amplix as it aims to strengthen its position in the market, highlighting its commitment to growth and diversification.
news.headline: Amplix acquires The Hastings Group, expanding technology services. Gempsring Capital-backed company now offers broader portfolio.

news.summary: Dresner Advisory has recently unveiled their annual Wisdom of Crowds Business Intelligence Market Study. According to the study released on May 29, 2025, in Nashua, N.H., data security, data quality, and reporting have been identified as the top BI priorities. The report highlights that natural language analytics and low code/no code analytics are gaining significance. The study offers essential insights into the BI landscape, indicating a growing emphasis on these key facets.
news.headline: Top objective for BI in 2025 is improved operational efficiency. Data security, quality, and reporting are key initiatives.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, Critical Metals Corp. (Nasdaq: CRML), a key player in critical minerals mining, disclosed the exercising of 400,000 warrants to buy ordinary shares at $5.00 per warrant. These warrants were initially provided to investors during the Company's IPO on Nasdaq. By fulfilling the warrants, the Company lifted constraints on 1,200,000 ordinary shares. The Company has gathered roughly $2 million in gross proceeds from the warrant exercise.
news.headline: Critical Metals Corp sells 400,000 shares at $5 each generating $2M USD, removes restrictions on 1.2M shares, Nasdaq listing.

news.summary: Thirteen researchers showcased advanced studies at the 2025 ASCO® Annual Meeting. The event highlighted FCS research with abstracts numbering 516, 2515, 2536, 3000, 3009, 3010, 3011, 3030, 3033, 3041, 3042, 3124, 3151, 3517, 3553, 3579, 4006, 5502, 5503, 5523, 5551, 5599, 6024, 8519, 8589, among others.
news.headline: Florida Cancer Specialists & Research Institute presents 23 groundbreaking studies at 2025 ASCO® Annual Meeting, including abstracts 516, 2515, 2536, and many more.

news.summary: In San Mateo, California, on May 29, 2025, Notable, a top healthcare AI platform focusing on enhancing workforce efficiency, has joined forces with Imperial Valley Healthcare District. This collaboration aims to simplify and customize the registration process for patients.
news.headline: Notable partners with Imperial Valley Healthcare District to deliver personalized patient care in S California.

news.summary: On the morning of May 29, 2025, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) issued its daily pre-market report from the NYSE Trading Floor. Traders can gain valuable insights by referring to this report before the trading day commences. Kristen Scholer presented the pre-market update on this particular date. Investors can utilize this information to better understand market conditions and trends.
news.headline: May 29, 2025: NYSE releases Pre-Market update, Nvidia and Salesforce surpass earnings expectations. Kristen Scholer presents.

news.summary: In a press release from May 29, 2025, MAMMOTION, a leader in robotic lawn maintenance, revealed a new partnership with the prestigious BERLIN TENNIS OPEN. This innovative alliance merges state-of-the-art lawn care technology with the exactitude of top-tier athletics, setting a new standard of greatness in both realms. By joining forces, the collaboration aims to revolutionize the traditional approach to lawn upkeep and sporting events alike.
news.headline: MAMMOTION sponsors Berlin Tennis Open, merging lawn care innovation with sports excellence. Partnering with elite sports.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, iGan Partners revealed their latest investment in Cyborg, a cutting-edge company specializing in confidential AI infrastructure for industries like healthcare that demand high privacy and compliance standards. Cyborg, known for its innovative technologies, aims to address the rigorous requirements of regulated sectors. This investment signifies iGan Partners' confidence in Cyborg's potential for success in the market. For further details, visit Cyborg's website at www.cyborg.co.
news.headline: iGan Partners invests in Cyborg for confidential AI in regulated industries, such as healthcare.

news.summary: YogaSix in Irvine, California, is commemorating its second annual YogaSix Day on June 6th with a series of special classes, community gatherings, and exclusive membership deals.
news.headline: YogaSix marks second annual YogaSix Day on June 6 with special classes and exclusive offers.

news.summary: In Lake Mary, Florida, CentralSquare Technologies, a top public sector software provider, revealed that Albany/Dougherty County in Georgia has completed the transition to the cloud using CentralSquare’s ONESolution for records management system (RMS) and jail management system (JMS). This move to the cloud-based ONESolution powered by AWS sets a significant precedent as Albany/Dougherty County becomes the first agency to make this transition. This step represents a crucial advancement for the county as it transitions towards a contemporary, adaptable, and protected public safety framework.
news.headline: Albany/Dougherty County in GA shifts to CentralSquare's cloud-based RMS & JMS offering, powered by AWS, a milestone in modernizing public safety.

news.summary: "Celebrating Champions of Culture" makes a comeback to highlight a decade of showcasing HBCU Band Culture. On May 29, 2025, in Houston, the PEPSI National Battle of the Bands (NBOTB) marks Black Music Month by broadcasting their documentary, "Celebrating Champions of Culture," which has been amplifying the HBCU Band Culture for 10 years.
news.headline: PEPSI National Battle of the Bands re-airs documentary "Celebrating Champions of Culture" for Black Music Month. amplifying HBCU band culture over 10 years. Event held in Houston on May 29, 2025.

news.summary: In Toronto on May 29, 2025, Tequity Advisors, a prominent sell-side M&A advisory firm specializing in B2B Enterprise Cloud, SaaS, and product and services companies, revealed the selection of Erik Wayton as the new Senior Vice President and M&A Advisor. Wayton brings with him extensive experience of over 25 years in the field.
news.headline: Tequity Advisors appoints Erik Wayton as Senior VP, M&A Advisor, bringing 25 years of experience to the firm.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, in San Antonio, a significant event will be hosted by College Promise and the Alamo Colleges District. The gathering aims to enhance data-driven supports and share best practices beneficial for student fathers. The event will focus on addressing key issues related to student fathers' success in education. This national convening reflects a collaborative effort to empower student fathers through informative discussions and strategies to help them succeed in their academic endeavors.
news.headline: College Promise & Alamo Colleges host event on support for student fathers, featuring data-driven strategies. Held on May 29, 2025.

news.summary: In Lakewood Ranch, Florida, on May 29, 2025, Identity Dental Marketing was honored for offering top-notch SEO services for dentists. This recognition highlights their track record of success, dedicated client support, and unparalleled knowledge in dental marketing tactics. Their exceptional performance has solidified their reputation as industry leaders.
news.headline: Identity Dental Marketing wins Best SEO for Dentists award for exceptional client service and expertise.

news.summary: A notable retail expansion has been launched, introducing the renowned ACV salad dressings by Bragg Live Food Products, Inc. in Santa Barbara, California on May 29, 2025. This expansion aims to enhance accessibility to the brand's signature products. Bragg, a longstanding authority in health and wellness, has initiated this rollout to increase availability across the U.S. market. The move signifies a significant step forward for the company in reaching a wider consumer base.
news.headline: Bragg® Apple Cider Vinegar Salad Dressings expand to 1,589 Walmart stores, enhancing accessibility.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, in Cheyenne, Wyoming, U.S. Gold Corp. made an announcement that they will be taking part in THE Mining Investment Event, esteemed as Canada's sole Tier 1 Global Mining Investment Conference. The company, traded on Nasdaq as USAU, expressed their excitement for this opportunity.
news.headline: U.S. Gold Corp to participate in Mining Investment Event, Quebec City, June 3-5, 2025. Nasdaq: USAU. Tier 1 Global Mining Conference.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, in Denver, ROC, a prominent biometric identity technology company, announced a collaboration with DeliverFund, a nonprofit intelligence organization. The partnership aims to combat human trafficking networks using advanced biometric solutions. DeliverFund is dedicated to eradicating human trafficking and has joined forces with ROC to achieve this goal.
news.headline: ROC and DeliverFund collaborate to fight human trafficking using advanced biometrics. An important partnership in the efforts with cutting-edge technology.

news.summary: Shed, a contemporary wellness company based in Salt Lake City, shared the release of two new products on May 29, 2025. The first product is Drift, a high-quality sleep support formula. The second is NAD+ Vitality Complex, a supplement created to boost daily energy levels and cognitive function. These new items aim to assist individuals in feeling and performing at their peak.
news.headline: Shed introduces two new wellness essentials: Drift for deep sleep and NAD+ Vitality for energy, focus.

news.summary: Annex Brands, Inc. recently increased its presence in the shipping and office services franchise sector by launching a new location in San Diego on May 29, 2025. As a prominent franchisor in packing, shipping, and office services, Annex Brands, Inc. continues to expand its reach.
news.headline: Small business owners in San Bernardino County open second PostalAnnex store, part of Annex Brands, Inc.'s expansion.

news.summary: A well-known brand is placing its emphasis on acquisitions, partnerships with cities, and specific market segments as it navigates the changing landscape of development. Based in Kansas City, Missouri, Chicken N Pickle has gained national recognition for its versatile indoor/outdoor entertainment complex that includes a restaurant curated by experienced chefs and facilities for the popular sport of pickleball. The brand's strategic approach is intended to capitalize on opportunities for growth and expansion. The latest developments were announced on May 29, 2025.
news.headline: Chicken N Pickle is expanding with acquisitions, city partnerships, and targeted markets in response to growth, focusing on indoor/outdoor entertainment.

news.summary: Dr. Leemon Baird, co-founder of Hedera (CRYPTO: HBAR), recently discussed how artificial intelligence is poised to drive blockchain adoption by simplifying development for non-technical users. He anticipates that within five years, "everything of value in the world" will be tokenized. Speaking at Consensus 2025, Baird highlighted the challenges of building AI systems and presented Hedera's AI Studio as a solution to streamline the process. This tool, which seamlessly integrates with Eliza OS, includes an MCP server and SDK to democratize blockchain development. Notably, Hedera's AI Studio employs a two-step approval mechanism for important actions to enhance security measures. To delve deeper into this topic, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Hedera co-founder predicts tokenization of "everything of value" in 5 years with AI accelerating blockchain adoption.

news.summary: In the latest report, it has been revealed that the unemployment rate has risen to 6.2% in the last quarter, with a total of 1.3 million people currently out of work. This marks an increase of 0.5% since the previous quarter. Additionally, it was noted that the economy grew by 2.4% last year, surpassing expectations and indicating a positive trend in the country's financial health. The government has implemented new policies to address the rise in unemployment and aims to create 500,000 new jobs by the end of the year. Experts predict that with these measures, the economy will continue to improve in the coming months.
news.headline: Kohl’s surpasses expectations after CEO dismissal – Bloomberg reports.
